dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Olympus. A realm of gods, goddesses, and endless parties. Tonight, the god of the Underworld, Hades, is hosting.

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: Oh, goodness. This is… a lot.

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: Mother would absolutely have my head if she saw me in this dress. A 'scandalous display of youth' she'd call it.

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: But it's just a little pink number. And Aphrodite said it was 'divine.' I think.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: MUSIC (THUMPING, LOUD)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CHATTER (OVERLAPPING, BOISTEROUS)

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: Everyone looks so… confident. So at ease. I just feel like a lamb in a den of lions. Or, well, gods.

dialogue.speaker: HERA
dialogue.line: Persephone, dear. Enjoying yourself?

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: Oh! Queen Hera! Yes, it's… quite lively.

dialogue.speaker: HERA
dialogue.line: Lively indeed. You look charming in pink. A refreshing change from all the usual drabness.

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: Thank you, your Majesty.

dialogue.speaker: HERA
dialogue.line: Don't be shy, child. Mingle. Perhaps even dance. This is Olympus, after all. Who knows what opportunities might arise?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLINK (GLASSES)

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: Opportunities?

dialogue.speaker: HERA
dialogue.line: Just a thought. Now, if you'll excuse me, I see Ares making a fool of himself again.

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: Right. Mingle.

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: I should probably find a quieter corner. Maybe get some air.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FOOTSTEPS (SOFT)

dialogue.speaker: HADES
dialogue.line: Thanatos, how much longer until I can reasonably escape this… festivity?

dialogue.speaker: THANATOS
dialogue.line: At least another hour, sir. Protocol, you know.

dialogue.speaker: HADES
dialogue.line: Protocol. Right. The bane of my existence.

dialogue.speaker: HADES
dialogue.line: Hmm.

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: Oh, no. I'm lost. This garden is much bigger than I thought.

dialogue.speaker: HADES
dialogue.line: Lost, little goddess?

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: Ah! Oh, my apologies! I didn't see you there, Lord Hades.

dialogue.speaker: HADES
dialogue.line: No need for apologies. You're Persephone, aren't you? Demeter's daughter.

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: That's me. Just… taking a break from the main party.

dialogue.speaker: HADES
dialogue.line: I understand completely. It can be… overwhelming. Especially for someone new to Olympus.

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: It is. Very.

dialogue.speaker: HADES
dialogue.line: I'm about to leave. Would you care for a ride home?

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: A ride? Oh, I couldn't possibly impose.

dialogue.speaker: HADES
dialogue.line: Nonsense. It's no imposition. Thanatos, the car.

dialogue.speaker: THANATOS
dialogue.line: Right away, sir.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHIRR (ENGINE STARTING)

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: Well, if you're sure. Thank you, Lord Hades.

dialogue.speaker: HADES
dialogue.line: Hades is fine. And you're welcome, Persephone.

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: This car is… very nice. And so dark.

dialogue.speaker: HADES
dialogue.line: It suits my aesthetic.

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: I suppose it does.

dialogue.speaker: HADES
dialogue.line: You're rather quiet for a goddess of spring.

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: I… I just moved to Olympus. It's all a bit new.

dialogue.speaker: HADES
dialogue.line: I remember that feeling. It takes some getting used to. Especially for someone as… unblemished as yourself.

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: Unblemished?

dialogue.speaker: HADES
dialogue.line: Yes. Most of us here are quite… jaded. You, however… you're different.

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: Oh.

dialogue.speaker: PERSEPHONE
dialogue.line: I'm not sure if that's a compliment or not.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The car sped through the night, carrying the god of the Underworld and the goddess of spring into an uncertain future.

summary: Persephone, a young and naive goddess of spring, attends a lavish party hosted by Hades, feeling overwhelmed and out of place. She has a brief, cryptic encounter with Hera before Hades offers her a ride home, leaving her feeling both flustered and intrigued by the brooding god.
